name: python3-pyyaml-env-tag
title: python3-pyyaml-env-tag
summary: Custom YAML tag for referencing environment variables (Python3 version)
description:
Custom YAML tag for referencing environment variables (Python3 version)
This library is the Python port of yaml-env-tag, a Ruby library to use
referenced environment variables within YAML files.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyyaml-env-tag because Custom YAML tag for referencing environment variables (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyyaml-env-tag as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyyaml-env-tag with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyyaml-env-tag --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
